epigraph.quote: John revised for his GCSEs, while the rest of us walked down to the estuary.

per_stop.quote: We're all sleeping in the van. Charles top bunk, John bottom bunk, Tonic in the cab.
John says (when asked what he remembers) that 'the food was quite good.'
Beautiful warm sun in day, v. cold at night.
Matins. Friendly, sermon, good, Bible based, on wives submitting to husbands!
after much map reading + travel, including Polperro, we gave up + set off for home.
